C:\Users\lain\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\emcc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=createWalletModule -sENVIRONMENT=web,worker -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=16MB "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['cwrap','ccall','getValue','setValue','UTF8ToString','stringToUTF8','lengthBytesUTF8','HEAPU8']" "-sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_mc_web_bip39_generate_12','_mc_web_bip39_validate','_mc_web_wallet_from_mnemonic','_mc_web_wallet_get_address','_mc_web_wallet_get_pubkey','_mc_web_wallet_sign','_mc_web_wallet_free','_mc_web_eip55_checksum_inplace','_mc_web_bytes_to_hex','_mc_web_hex_to_bytes']" --closure=1 -O3 @CMakeFiles\wallet.dir\objects1.rsp -o wallet.js @CMakeFiles\wallet.dir\linkLibs.rsp
